series_metadata.series_description: Formerly FIS-12 (019-0012). This record set consists of three fiscal documents which are grouped together for each distribution of reimbursement payments to counties. The documents are: A. Auditor's Warrant Journal. These are the applicable pages from

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain current fiscal year plus next most recent fiscal year on-site. Remove older records to off-site storage for two years, then destroy provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released., Paper: Shred
